tools.name: searchProducts
tools.description: Search for products matching the user's requirements. Supports filtering by brand, category, and rating. Supports pagination with page and limit. ALWAYS call this tool when the user asks about products — do NOT respond with text-only answers about products.

query.description: Core product keywords only (e.g., 'running shoes', 'gaming laptop'). Keep it short. Do not include price or size constraints in the query text.

brand.description: Brand name filter. ONLY set if user explicitly mentions a brand. Include the brand in the query too — this is an additional server-side filter.

category.description: Product category filter. ONLY use if the user explicitly mentions a category. Do NOT infer — the query itself handles relevance. Categories must match exactly what Amazon uses (e.g., 'Wrist Watches', not 'Watches').

minRating.description: Minimum rating from 0 to 5. ONLY set this if the user explicitly asks for highly-rated products. Do NOT default to any value — most products have no rating data and will be filtered out.

page.description: Page number for pagination (1-based, default 1). Use when user asks for 'more results' or 'next page'.

limit.description: Number of results to return (default 20, max 20).

returns.products: Array of ProductCard objects with: id, name, image, images, price (in cents), currency, retailer, product_url, rating, brand, description, category

usage_rules: ALWAYS call this tool when the user mentions wanting to see, find, or buy products
Keep query short and product-focused. Do not encode price or size constraints into the query text
ONLY include brand, category, or minRating when the user explicitly asked for them
If search returns 0 results, retry with FEWER filters (remove brand, category, minRating)
Prices are returned in CENTS — divide by 100 for display (e.g., 14999 → $149.99)
Default limit is 20
Use page parameter when user asks for 'more', 'next', or 'show me more'

tools.name: getProductDetails
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific product by its ID (ASIN). Use when the user wants more details about a product from search results.

productId.description: Product ID (ASIN) from a previous searchProducts result

usage_rules: Only call after searchProducts — you need a valid product ID
Use when user says 'tell me more about...', 'details on...', or clicks a product
Present specifications in a readable format

tools.name: viewCart
tools.description: View the current contents of the user's shopping cart. Returns all items with prices and a total.

returns.items: Array of cart items with id, productId, productName, price (cents), priceFormatted, image, size, color, productUrl, retailer

usage_rules: Call when user asks what's in their cart, or before checkout
Use 'id' field as 'itemId' for removeFromCart and 'cartItemId' for initiateCheckout

tools.name: addToCart
tools.description: Add a product to the user's shopping cart. ONLY call when the user explicitly says they want to add something to their cart.

productName.description: Full product name from searchProducts result

price.description: Price in cents from searchProducts result (e.g., 14999)

image.description: Primary image URL from searchProducts result

size.description: Selected size. Ask the user before adding if the product has sizes. Use 'Default' if not applicable.

color.description: Selected color. Ask the user before adding if the product has color options. Use 'Default' if not applicable.

productUrl.description: Product page URL from searchProducts result

returns.item: Added cart item with id, productName, priceFormatted

usage_rules: ONLY call after the user explicitly asks to add an item to cart
You MUST have product data from a prior searchProducts or getProductDetails call
If the product has sizes (e.g., clothing, shoes), ask the user which size before adding
If the product has colors, ask the user which color before adding
Max 10 items allowed in cart

tools.name: removeFromCart
tools.description: Remove a specific item from the cart. Requires the cart item UUID from viewCart.

itemId.description: Cart item UUID from viewCart 'id' field

usage_rules: Call viewCart first to get the itemId
Only call when user explicitly asks to remove an item

tools.name: initiateCheckout
tools.description: Start checkout for one item in the cart. The user must have a wallet and shipping address set up first.

cartItemId.description: Cart item UUID from viewCart 'id' field to checkout

usage_rules: Call viewCart first to get the cartItemId
Only call when user explicitly says they want to checkout or buy
If checkout fails with missing wallet or address, tell the user to complete their profile first
If checkout fails with insufficient funds, tell the user to add funds to their wallet
